channel.title: index on Blogs: From My Personal Selection Of Perspectives
channel.description: Recent content in index on Blogs: From My Personal Selection Of Perspectives

item.title: About This Blog
item.author: scanscuri@gmail.com (fmpsp)
item.description:
It’s incredibly easy to get lost nowadays. With so many things vying for my attention, I needed a place where I could stay still and take my time. A place where I could focus on myself, and only myself.

In the absence of text, this white void, every corner of the screen reflects back to… me. This is my sandbox. Here, I build and craft fragments of worlds, all mine. My own little digital home for my little digital self.

item.title: Poem: Gayuma
item.author: scanscuri@gmail.com (fmpsp)
item.description:
Gayuma

Hindi makaalis, ang puso ng mata
Diretso sa bula, hindi makawala
Huwag na magtiis, ang ulo mo’y wala
Sa ‘yong nadarama, Walang magagawa

Hindi salamangka, ikaw nagsimula
Naligo, sa batis, biglang wala ka na
Sa ulap ang mata, saan ka pumunta?
Diretso, sa nais, walang wala ka na

Walang wala ka na, mula taas-baba
Mula taas-baba, patuloy ang wala
Sarili’y inipon, inalay sa iba
Sarili’y nalais, napagsamantala

item.title: Poem: Pasahero/Passenger
item.author: scanscuri@gmail.com (fmpsp)
item.description:
Pasahero

Namumutlang damdamin
Katawang tuyong tuyo
Mamaya ay iisipin
Ang ngayo’y hindi buo

Orasang walang kamay
Kapalaran hinayaan
Sasakyang walang sakay
Ang sarili babayaran

Tagaktak na itong pawis
“Walang bawas, walang labis”
Ang kamay makasarili
Pawang nawalang langis

Ang hinaharap ngayon
Talikod na panahon
Bababa nalang sa kanto
Ang dereyalisasyon

Passenger

Feeling weak and tired
The body, wrung and dry
Thinking by and by
The now has gone awry
